# CLKComplicationFamily.utilitarianSmallFlat

**Case**

A small rectangular area that ClockKit Displays on the Photos, Motion, and Timelapse watch faces.

## Declaration

```swift
case utilitarianSmallFlat
```

## Discussion

The following figure shows the size and location of the utilitarian small flat complication.



The utilitarian small flat family can display only the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateUtilitarianSmallFlat] template.

## Utilitarian

- **CLKComplicationFamily.utilitarianSmall**: A small square or rectangular area that ClockKit Displays on the Utility, Mickey, Chronograph, and Simple watch faces.
- **CLKComplicationFamily.utilitarianLarge**: A large rectangular area that spans the width of the screen in the Utility and Mickey watch faces.
